question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 50.00% on 2026-04-11 for the Metaculus question "Will an AI-created song chart in the top 20 of the Billboard Hot 100 before 2027?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP on "Will an AI-created song chart in the top 20 of the Billboard Hot 100 before 2027?" will be strictly above 50% on April 11, 2026. The CP is currently at exactly 50.00% — right at the threshold. The strict "higher than" criterion means staying at 50% resolves NO, creating inherent asymmetry. The CP has been trending downward from a 56% peak in early March, though it bounced from 48% to 50% in the last week. The Manifold market for the identical question sits at ~31%, well below Metaculus CP, suggesting informed forecasters are more bearish. Billboard blocked an AI song from the Hot 100 in November 2025, indicating institutional resistance. With 889 forecasters and no visible catalyst in the next 12 days, CP is unlikely to move dramatically. Monte Carlo simulation using observed weekly CP changes gives ~43% probability of exceeding the threshold.

factors.description: CP is exactly at 50.00% threshold - 'strictly above' means staying at 50% resolves NO, creating slight asymmetry toward NO
Recent downward trend: CP fell from 56% to 48% over 3 weeks (early to late March), suggesting bearish drift among forecasters
Recent bounce: CP recovered from 48% to 50% in the last week, showing some upward resilience near the 50% level
Manifold market for identical question at ~31% - significantly below Metaculus CP of 50%, suggesting informed forecasters are more bearish and CP may face downward pressure
Billboard actively blocked an AI song (HAVEN 'I Run') from Hot 100 in Nov 2025 - institutional resistance reduces likelihood of underlying event and may dampen forecaster optimism
889 forecasters make CP relatively stable - less likely to swing dramatically in 12 days without major news catalyst
CP has spent 4 of 6 observed weeks above 50%, suggesting the natural resting point may be slightly above 50%
No concrete catalyst visible in next 12 days - no AI song currently near the Hot 100, and the underlying question has 9 months left to resolve

reasoning:
**Forecast: 43% probability** that the CP will be above 50% on April 11, 2026.

**Key reasoning:**

- **Knife-edge position**: CP is at exactly 50.00%, and the resolution requires *strictly above* 50%. This asymmetry slightly favors NO since the status quo resolves NO.
- **Downward drift**: CP peaked at 56% in early March and has fallen to 50%, suggesting gradual bearish sentiment. The recent bounce from 48% to 50% shows some resilience but hasn't reversed the larger trend.
- **Manifold discrepancy**: The Manifold market for the identical underlying question sits at ~31%, well below Metaculus's 50% CP. This gap suggests the Metaculus CP may face continued downward pressure as forecasters update.
- **Institutional resistance**: Billboard blocked the first AI song from the Hot 100 in November 2025, which complicates the underlying question and may suppress forecaster optimism.
- **Stable base**: With 889 forecasters, large CP movements in just 12 days are unlikely without a major catalyst, and none is visible on the horizon.

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/40969) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-11 17:41:28 is higher than 50.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 50.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-11 17:41:28, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
